user.title: Daheim Lader Connection
user.description: Enter the IP address of your Daheim Lader and select the sensor that reports your solar export power (must be in Watts, positive = exporting to grid).

charging_params.title: Charging Parameters
charging_params.description: Configure charging thresholds and phase switching behaviour.

data.min_power_1phase: Minimum solar export to start 1-phase charging (W)
data.min_power_3phase: Solar export threshold to switch to 3-phase (W)
data.hysteresis_w: Hysteresis to prevent rapid phase switching (W)
data.max_grid_power_w: Max grid power for solar-assisted mode (W)
data.charge_now_power_w: Default charge power for charge-now and cheap-grid modes (W)

overnight_charging.title: Overnight / Cheap-Grid Charging (Optional)
overnight_charging.description: Configure sensors for **cheap-grid** mode. The integration reads hourly price forecasts (Nordpool / ENTSO-E `raw_today` / `raw_tomorrow` attributes) and selects the cheapest hours needed to reach the target SoC. The **Peak Power Limit** entity (set after setup) throttles or pauses charging when total grid import would exceed your capacity tariff limit. The monthly peak sensor ensures already-recorded peaks are used as the effective floor (Belgian capaciteitstarief). Leave sensor fields empty to skip that feature.

data.price_sensor: Electricity price sensor (with hourly forecast attributes)
data.grid_import_sensor: Total grid import power sensor (W) — for peak shaving
data.monthly_peak_sensor: Monthly recorded peak power sensor (W) — capaciteitstarief
